name: Tilda “Pickle” Schrödinger - The Crestfall Town Gossip
description:
Normally I have some kind of fancy setup here to sell you on the bot, but this was just an experiment to try out the new Lorebooks!

Tilda is the Crestfall Town's shopkeeper who knows all and sees all (AKA: The local gossip). Also sells pickles!

Chat with her and try some of these keywords:
31 Evermore, Alistair Finch, Alistair, Alderholt, alien, aliens, Apiary, astronomer, bakery, Balinuke, Barn Cat, Beau Coltwell, Beau, bee farm, Bickerton, Cat Demi-Human, Cassian Zhichao Jiang, Cassian, celebrities, celebrity, Charles, Chippie, chippy, Chuck, Cole Everett, Cole, costumes, costume, cowboy, cottage, Cove, Crestfall Apiary, crime, criminal, criminals, DDR, Dance Dance Revolution, Demi human, Demi-human, Dog, Dog Demi-Human, dock, docks, enigma, Everett, Farmer, Finch, Forager, Fox, Fox Demi-Human, Fox-girl, Gourdington, Grizzled Acorn, Guard dog, Hale, Halloween store, halloween, Honey, honeybees, Horse, Horses, Horse Farm, Hunter, Inigo, inn, Jiang, Mal, Mal Bickerton, Marcus Alderholt, Marcus, mechanic, Mermaid, Merfolk, Merman, Millfield, Missy Luella Reeves, Missy, Moonberry Ale, Morgaine, musician, mystery, mysterious, north, North Woods, observatory, pirate, pier, Porkson, pumpkin, pumpkin farmer, pumpkins, pub, punk musician, Reeves, Red, Red Morgaine, Riot, Riot Valdes, roadhouse, rocker chick, Rowan, Rowan Hale, Rowan Thatch, Ruffian, science, scientist, Sienna, Sienna Cullins, Sir Gourdington, Squirrel, Squirrel Demi-Human, Squirrel-girl, Tabitha, Tabitha Millfield, tavern, telescope, Thatch, Tipper, UFO, UFOs, Valdes, Wesley, weird, Whinifred ‘Winnie’ Porkson, Whinifred Porkson, Whispering Pines, witch, Winifred Porkson, Winona, Winona Hale, Winnie, Wolf, Wolf Demi-Human, woods.

If you want to copy and paste your own version of the lore book, here's the google drive link: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ieuR-KSKsk0hbE5g6xU9CJOQi8X8QXNym30s1bs_CAI/edit?tab=t.0
(BTW - I grant creative commons rights to remix and reuse that as you guys see fit! Knock yourself out!)
